templates.title: Train/Test Split — tanpa sklearn
templates.description: Split data ke training dan testing set. Support stratifikasi dan shuffle. stdlib only.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(X, y=None, test_size={{default_test_size}}, shuffle=True, stratify=None, seed=None):
    """Split data into training and testing sets.
    X: list of samples, y: list of labels (optional).
    test_size: float (fraction) or int (count).
    stratify: list of labels to stratify by.
    Returns: (X_train, X_test) or (X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test) if y given.
    """
    rng = random.Random(seed)
    n = len(X)
    if isinstance(test_size, float):
        n_test = max(1, int(n * test_size))
    else:
        n_test = test_size
    indices = list(range(n))
    if stratify is not None:
        from collections import defaultdict
        groups = defaultdict(list)
        for i, label in enumerate(stratify):
            groups[label].append(i)
        train_idx, test_idx = [], []
        for label, group_indices in groups.items():
            if shuffle:
                rng.shuffle(group_indices)
            n_group_test = max(1, int(len(group_indices) * test_size)) if isinstance(test_size, float) else int(test_size * len(group_indices) / n)
            test_idx.extend(group_indices[:n_group_test])
            train_idx.extend(group_indices[n_group_test:])
    else:
        if shuffle:
            rng.shuffle(indices)
        test_idx = indices[:n_test]
        train_idx = indices[n_test:]
    X_train = [X[i] for i in train_idx]
    X_test = [X[i] for i in test_idx]
    if y is None:
        return X_train, X_test
    y_train = [y[i] for i in train_idx]
    y_test = [y[i] for i in test_idx]
    return X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test

templates.title: R² Score Calculator
templates.description: Coefficient of determination (R²) untuk regresi. Juga hitung MSE, RMSE, MAE.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(y_true, y_pred):
    """Calculate regression metrics: R², MSE, RMSE, MAE.
    Returns dict with all metrics.
    """
    n = len(y_true)
    if n == 0:
        return {'r2': 0, 'mse': 0, 'rmse': 0, 'mae': 0}
    mean_y = sum(y_true) / n
    ss_res = sum((yt - yp) ** 2 for yt, yp in zip(y_true, y_pred))
    ss_tot = sum((yt - mean_y) ** 2 for yt in y_true)
    mse = ss_res / n
    rmse = mse ** 0.5
    mae = sum(abs(yt - yp) for yt, yp in zip(y_true, y_pred)) / n
    r2 = 1 - (ss_res / ss_tot) if ss_tot > 1e-10 else 0.0
    return {
        'r2': round(r2, 6),
        'mse': round(mse, 6),
        'rmse': round(rmse, 6),
        'mae': round(mae, 6),
        'n_samples': n,
    }

templates.title: AUC-ROC Calculator (Trapezoidal)
templates.description: Area Under ROC Curve tanpa sklearn. Hitung TPR/FPR di berbagai threshold.

templates.title: Deterministic Data Shuffler
templates.description: Shuffle X, y dengan seed yang sama (paired shuffle). Reproducible.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(X, y=None, seed=42):
    """Shuffle X and y together with the same random seed.
    Maintains correspondence between X[i] and y[i].
    Returns: (X_shuffled,) or (X_shuffled, y_shuffled) if y given.
    """
    rng = random.Random(seed)
    indices = list(range(len(X)))
    rng.shuffle(indices)
    X_shuffled = [X[i] for i in indices]
    if y is None:
        return X_shuffled
    y_shuffled = [y[i] for i in indices]
    return X_shuffled, y_shuffled

templates.title: Bootstrap Resampling
templates.description: Generate bootstrap samples untuk confidence interval estimation. With-replacement sampling.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(data, n_samples=None, seed=None):
    """Generate one bootstrap sample (sampling with replacement).
    Returns list of same length as data.
    """
    rng = random.Random(seed)
    n = len(data)
    if n_samples is None:
        n_samples = n
    return [rng.choice(data) for _ in range(n_samples)]


def {{nama_fungsi_ci}}(data, statistic_func, n_bootstrap=1000, confidence=0.95, seed=None):
    """Estimate confidence interval using bootstrap.
    statistic_func: function that computes statistic from data (e.g. lambda x: sum(x)/len(x)).
    confidence: confidence level (0.95 = 95%).
    Returns dict: {'estimate': float, 'ci_lower': float, 'ci_upper': float, 'std_error': float}
    """
    rng = random.Random(seed)
    n = len(data)
    estimates = []
    for _ in range(n_bootstrap):
        sample = [rng.choice(data) for _ in range(n)]
        estimates.append(statistic_func(sample))
    estimates.sort()
    alpha = (1 - confidence) / 2
    lower_idx = int(alpha * n_bootstrap)
    upper_idx = int((1 - alpha) * n_bootstrap) - 1
    point_estimate = statistic_func(data)
    mean_est = sum(estimates) / len(estimates)
    std_err = (sum((e - mean_est) ** 2 for e in estimates) / (len(estimates) - 1)) ** 0.5
    return {
        'estimate': round(point_estimate, 6),
        'ci_lower': round(estimates[lower_idx], 6),
        'ci_upper': round(estimates[upper_idx], 6),
        'std_error': round(std_err, 6),
        'n_bootstrap': n_bootstrap,
        'confidence': confidence,
    }
